backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining Show and DJ types with full CRUD operations, including creating DJs/shows, assigning DJs to shows, and querying individual or all records using stable Maps.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (homepage, shows page, DJs page, admin dashboard, shows/DJs management) to their corresponding source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-line summaries of every frontend source file, covering pages, components, hooks, styles, and config.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens (background, foreground, primary, sidebar, chart colors, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'The Country Channel' that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with public routes (Home, Shows, DJs) under a public Layout and admin routes (Dashboard, ManageShows, ManageDJs) under AdminLayout.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLayou: Admin shell layout with a collapsible sidebar (desktop and mobile overlay) containing navigation links to Dashboard, Manage Shows, and Manage DJs, plus a top header bar and an Outlet for nested routes.
frontend/src/components/admin/DJFormModa: Modal dialog for creating a new DJ (name, bio, photo URL) or viewing an existing DJ's details; editing existing DJs is unsupported by the backend so fields are disabled in edit mode.
frontend/src/components/admin/ShowFormMo: Modal dialog for creating a new radio show or editing an existing one's DJ assignment, with form validation and fields for title, description, schedule day/time, and DJ selection.
frontend/src/components/DJCard.tsx: Reusable card component that displays a DJ's avatar, name, bio, and a list of their associated shows using country-themed amber/tan styling.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand logo, quick navigation links, a live broadcast status indicator, copyright notice, and a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Public layout wrapper that composes the Navigation bar, a page Outlet, and the Footer into a full-height flex column.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive top navigation bar with links to Home, Shows, DJs, and Admin pages, using TanStack Router for active-link detection and a mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/ShowCard.tsx: Card component that displays a radio show's title, description, schedule day/time, and optionally the assigned DJ's name.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout flows, and persisted delegation identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching all shows and DJs, and mutations for creating shows, creating DJs, and assigning DJs to shows via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for a warm country-themed light and dark color scheme.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard displaying stat cards for total shows, DJs, and assigned shows, plus a recent-shows table with links to management pages.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ManageDJs.tsx: Admin page for managing DJs, showing a grid of DJ cards with edit buttons and an Add DJ button that opens a DJFormModal for creating or editing entries.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ManageShows.tsx: Admin page for managing radio shows, displaying a table of existing shows with edit actions and a modal form for creating or editing shows. Uses React Query hooks to fetch shows and DJs data, with loading skeletons and an empty state.
frontend/src/pages/DJs.tsx: Public DJs listing page that fetches all DJs and shows, then renders them in a responsive grid of DJCard components with loading skeletons and an empty state.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Public home page featuring a hero banner with a live-listen button, followed by featured shows and DJs sections pulled from query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/Shows.tsx: Public shows listing page that fetches all shows and DJs and renders them in a responsive grid of ShowCard components with loading and empty states.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Country Channel project, defining custom fonts (Playfair Display, Source Serif 4), a country-themed color palette (amber, tan, burnt-orange, wood-dark, admin variants), and animation keyframes for accordions.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing 'The Country Channel' radio station website, listing implemented features (homepage, shows page, DJs page, admin dashboard with CRUD for shows and DJs), required images, and architectural metadata.
